hooks.command: bash -c 'COUNT=$(ls agent-inbox/pending/*.json 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d " "); if [ "$COUNT" -gt 0 ]; then echo ""; echo "┌─ Agent Inbox ──────────────────────────────────────┐"; echo "│  ⚠  $COUNT pending job(s) in agent-inbox/pending/  │"; echo "│  Run /process-inbox to start working on them.      │"; echo "└────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘"; fi'

bash -c 'COUNT=$(ls agent-inbox/pending/*.json 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d " "); if [ "$COUNT" -gt 0 ]; then echo "[agent-inbox] $COUNT pending job(s) detected. The orchestrator has queued work. Check agent-inbox/pending/ and process with the orchestrator agent."; fi'
